Yang Ang ś•äśėā
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yang Ang (ś•äśėā)was born in Hanzhong?. Fought under Ma Chao and aided Zhang Wei in building strong defences against Cao Cao. Yang Ang was affiliated with Zhang Lu. Yang Ang lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
